simple_types.name: Arg_Type_Attribute
simple_types.code:
type Arg_Type_Attribute is
  (Type_Integer,
   Type_Unsigned_Integer,
   Type_String,
   Type_FD,
   Type_New_Id,
   Type_Object,
   Type_Fixed,
   Type_Array);

simple_types.name: Interface_Child_Kind_Id
simple_types.code:
type Interface_Child_Kind_Id is
  (Child_Dummy, Child_Description, Child_Request, Child_Event, Child_Enum);

simple_types.name: Protocol_Child_Kind_Id
simple_types.code:
type Protocol_Child_Kind_Id is
  (Child_Dummy, Child_Copyright, Child_Interface, Child_Description);

   "="          => "=");
